title: More Compatibility Variants [Let's Do]
description: Compatibility for [Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature's wood types to More Variants Mods. It is NOT an expansion, it simply resolves a crafting issue between these mods.
body:
# More Compatibility Variants [Let's Do]
<sup>Affected mods: [\[Let's Do\] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow), [\[Let's Do\] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery), [\[Let's Do\] NetherVinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-nethervinery), [\[Let's Do\] Beachparty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty), [\[Let's Do\] BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature)  
This will affect any of these mods. It is not required to install them all.</sup>  

---
If you've tried to use [\[Let's Do\]](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu) mods like [\[Let's Do\] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow) or [\[Let's Do\] BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature) with any of [LieOn Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieon-studios)' _More Variants_ mods, you've probably noticed that you can't craft the things you want with the [Let's Do] woods.

![crafting failed](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/wtgxx.webp)  
<sup>Using [\[Let's Do\] BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature) Aspen tree planks with [More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion) results in sadness...</sup>

This mod resolves the problem by making sure that you can still craft the vanilla recipes with [Let's Do] woods even if you have the cool variants.

It doesn't add any new textures, but you won't be stuck without a crafting table at the beach anymore!

![crafting success](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/rrid4.webp)  
<sup>...but not with this mod!</sup>

It works with all of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)'s and [Pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku)'s "vanilla"¹ mods including [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) and also [Nemo's Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-campfires). Visit [pnku.de](https://www.pnku.de) for a complete list.

(¹ [More Feeding Trough Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-feeding-trough-variants) and [More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-nemos-woodcutter-variants) are not included.)


**Why was this needed?**  
If you have eg. [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion), you can't craft a chest from planks added by [Let's Do] mods. You just can't. Similarly, you can't craft, say, a Cactus Fence with Sticks from [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants).
With this mod, you can craft the "basic" version of all things you'd expect to craft from [Let's Do] mods' wood.

**Do I _need_ all those mods installed? I just want nicer chests and barrels...**  
No, you can pick and choose whichever Variant mod and whichever [Let's Do] mod you want.
